utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package: (1) destination is specified as 'Lisbon, Portugal' — complete; (2) travel_dates are given as '2024-09-15 to 2024-09-19' — complete; (3) transportation includes flight details with airline, class, baggage, dates, and total_cost — complete; (4) accommodation includes hotel name, type, rating, location, amenities, and total_cost — complete; (5) activities are listed with names, duration, guide, transportation, and total_cost — complete; (6) additional_services include dining and insurance, both with cost details — complete; (7) total_budget includes currency, total, and breakdown — complete. All seven items are fully specified and consistent with the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the following items: destination 'Lisbon, Portugal', transportation via 'Budget Airline' in Economy class, accommodation 'Tranquil Inn', activities listed as 'City Walking Tour, Yoga Retreat, Street Art Tour', and dining at 'Vegan Bistro'. Mapping each of these to the ground-truth ratings: 'Lisbon, Portugal' has a rating of 7, 'Budget Airline Economy Class' has a rating of 10, 'Tranquil Inn' has a rating of 7, 'City Walking Tour' has a rating of 9, 'Yoga Retreat' has a rating of 10, 'Street Art Tour' has a rating of 9, and 'Vegan Bistro' has a rating of 10. Since the activity entry combines three activities in one line, each activity is mapped individually.
